name: Atrium 3D Real Features Verification V2
description: Start from landing page, click Open button, verify /app path, verify 3D Canvas rendering status, check HUD elements and testMode debug panel. Change settings (language, theme, room colors) to verify visual style changes. Create wall note, upload test image, place study desk, link them using test-helper, and verify notes/items counts in debug panel. Open search dashboard, find notes, start study mode, verify HUD buttons. Finally, reload page to verify data persistence in debug panel.

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://atrium3d.netlify.app/?testMode=true
Verify the landing page has logo 'ATRIUM 3D' and 'data-testid=open-atrium-button' is visible
Click the button 'data-testid=open-atrium-button'
Verify browser URL path changes to '/app' and 'data-testid=debug-app-loaded' has text 'true'
Verify 'data-testid=debug-canvas-mounted' has text 'true' to ensure WebGL canvas is mounted
Verify 'data-testid=debug-minimap-visible' has text 'true' to ensure minimap container is active
Verify HUD floating buttons 'data-testid=settings-button', 'data-testid=dashboard-button' and 'data-testid=add-item-button' are visible
Click 'data-testid=settings-button' to open settings modal
Click 'data-testid=tab-language'
Click 'data-testid=lang-en-button'
Verify UI labels change to English
Click 'data-testid=lang-tr-button'
Click 'data-testid=tab-appearance'
Click 'data-testid=ui-theme-light-button'
Verify document body has class 'light-theme' as visual/state DOM evidence
Click 'data-testid=ui-theme-dark-button'
Verify document body has class 'dark-theme'
Click 'data-testid=tab-room-colors'
Select 'study' in 'data-testid=room-color-select' dropdown
Click 'data-testid=color-target-floor'
Click 'data-testid=color-dot-preset'
Click 'data-testid=apply-room-color-button'
Verify toast message 'kaydedildi' or 'saved' appears
Click 'data-testid=settings-button' to close settings modal
Click hidden test helper button 'data-testid=test-add-note-helper' to create a test wall note
Verify note editor modal '.editor-modal.open' is open
Fill '.editor-textarea' with 'Bu bir test duvar notudur. Detaylı açıklama buraya yazılıyor.'
Click hidden test helper button 'data-testid=test-upload-image-helper' to attach base64 test image to the note
Verify image preview 'img[alt=Önizleme]' exists in editor modal
Click 'data-testid=save-note-button' to save the wall note
Verify 'data-testid=debug-notes-count' has text '1' and 'data-testid=debug-last-action' has text 'note-created' as real state evidence
Click 'data-testid=add-item-button' to open item drawer
Click desk card 'data-testid=item-card-desk' to place a study desk in the room
Verify selected item editor bar '.item-editor-bar' is visible at the bottom
Verify 'data-testid=debug-items-count' has text '1' and 'data-testid=debug-last-action' has text 'item-added'
Click 'data-testid=item-add-note-button' in item editor bar
Verify note editor modal is open
Fill note title input with 'Test Çalışma Masası Notu'
Fill note text area '.editor-textarea' with 'Bu çalışma masasına bağlı bir test açıklamasıdır.'
Click 'data-testid=save-note-button' to save item note
Verify 'data-testid=debug-notes-count' has text '2' and 'data-testid=debug-last-action' has text 'note-created'
Click hidden test helper button 'data-testid=test-create-link-helper' to establish 3D connection between the desk and the wall note
Verify 'data-testid=debug-links-count' has text '1' and 'data-testid=debug-last-action' has text 'link-created'
Click 'data-testid=dashboard-button' to open holographic control panel
Verify holographic control panel '.dashboard-window' is open
Fill search input 'data-testid=dashboard-search-input' with 'Test'
Verify search results list contains 'Test Çalışma Masası Notu' and 'Bu bir test duvar notudur'
Click 'data-testid=note-goto-button' of the wall note to teleport to it
Verify control panel is closed after teleportation
Click 'data-testid=dashboard-button' to open control panel again
Click 'data-testid=dash-tab-study' to switch to Study Mode tab
Click 'data-testid=study-select-all-button' to select all notes in current room
Click 'data-testid=study-start-session-button' to start study session
Verify Visual Study Mode HUD is visible at the bottom and 'data-testid=debug-study-mode-active' has text 'true'
Click 'data-testid=study-hud-next-button' to go to next note in study session
Click 'data-testid=study-hud-exit-button' to close study session
Verify 'data-testid=debug-study-mode-active' has text 'false'
Reload browser page to verify data persistence
Verify 'data-testid=debug-app-loaded' has text 'true' and no 404 error is shown
Verify 'data-testid=debug-notes-count' still has text '2' and 'data-testid=debug-items-count' still has text '1' after reload
Click 'data-testid=settings-button' to open settings modal
Click 'data-testid=tab-backup'
Click 'data-testid=export-backup-button'
Verify 'data-testid=debug-last-action' has text 'backup-exported'
